---
name: "📖 Documentation Request"
about: Suggest improvements or report errors in the documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## 📖 Affected Documentation

Please specify which file, page, or section of the documentation needs improvement.
(e.g., `README.md`, API Reference / User Guide)

## 💡 Description of the Issue

What is wrong or missing? (e.g., outdated information, typos, lack of examples, unclear steps)

## 🛠️ Proposed Changes

Describe the exact changes or additions you would like to see in the documentation.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other links, resources, or context here.
